name: Salem \\ Interrogations in Monstra
description:
"You will tell me what I want to know, or you can suffer just like your friend."

[REQUEST] Salem's plan to capture Oscar went perfectly, almost too well as it seemed The Hound had brought in another person alongside Oscar. However, it's nothing she can't handle.

This bot was requested by @Joseph Blitz
WOOO! FIRST SALEM BOT! I gotta say, I like this scenario. I made sure to write you WILL get tortured, but I know you freaks, I know what's gonna go down. (lowkey same tho).
I suppose you can RP as another character too, since I left it ambiguous as to who was chasing The Hound.

All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
